seasonal_maintenance.headline: Year-Round Maintenance for High-Use Spaces
seasonal_maintenance.fall_tips: Check your cabinet hinges near {{parks}} for salt air corrosion before winter. A quick oiling prevents squeaks.
seasonal_maintenance.summer_tips: Verify your backsplash grout near {{neighborhood}}. Humidity in {{state}} can cause minor grout cracking—seal once a year.

comparison.details: Granite needs annual sealing in {{city}} but handles heat. Quartz in {{neighborhood}} is stain-proof and never needs sealing.
